features: Powerful Antibacterial Action – Effectively eliminates germs and bacteria, ensuring a hygienic and fresh toilet after every use.
Citrus Fresh Scent – Leaves a refreshing citrus fragrance while keeping your toilet clean and odor-free.
Convenient & Easy to Use – Pre-moistened disposable wipes make toilet cleaning quick, simple, and hassle-free.
Durable & Effective – Designed to be strong yet gentle, these wipes efficiently remove dirt and stains from toilet surfaces.
Safe for Everyday Use – Contains liquid cleaning agents for enhanced sanitation while being safe for daily toilet maintenance.
description: Product description Green Shield Anti-Bacterial Toilet Cleaning Wipes are the perfect solution for maintaining a fresh and germ-free toilet. Infused with a powerful antibacterial formula , these wipes effectively eliminate bacteria and dirt while leaving behind a pleasant citrus scent . Each pack contains 40 pre-moistened wipes , designed for easy, mess-free cleaning of toilet surfaces. The durable material ensures efficient scrubbing without tearing, making them an essential cleaning staple for every household. Perfect for daily toilet maintenance , these wipes provide quick and effective cleaning with no need for additional sprays or liquids. Simply grab, wipe, and dispose—keeping your toilet fresh and hygienic at all times. Safety Warning NO
